hero.heading: Care that begins with
hero.subhead: A physician known for taking the time to listen, building real relationships, and helping patients feel genuinely cared for.

drStewart.heading: Meet Dr.
drStewart.bio1: Dr. Stewart brings more than 25 years of private-practice experience to adult primary care — board-certified in internal medicine, with a particular focus on women's health alongside full-spectrum adult care.
drStewart.bio2: She moved to Vero Beach in 2022 and, after a stint with the VA, returns to what she does best — building long-term relationships with patients she actually knows. She's especially looking forward to caring for the young adults aging out of Vero Beach Pediatrics and the parents who've been part of that family for years.

cta.heading: Ready to become a patient?
cta.subhead: New patients are welcome. Schedule your first visit in minutes.
